title: UniProt connector (REST) — a protein record as SQL
description: A connector is a MANIFEST, zero TypeScript. A UniProt entry is a GET to rest.uniprot.org parsed straight into a table by ducknng_ncurl_table; the accession is the agent's binding {uniprot_acc}. This starter hardcodes only Accept. If this shape becomes token-gated, keep auth host-owned: the host registers a scoped ducknng HTTP profile and SQL supplies only profile_id. Use http.get + withAuth only as the dynamic-refresh fallback when a ducknng profile is not available.

resolvers.title: SQL materialize
resolvers.description: Materialize a table from a read-only SELECT (here a ducknng_ncurl_table GET).
